title: Code Organization
description: File structure, naming, separation of concerns
longDescription: AI can write code, but it can't organize a codebase. As your project grows, good structure is the difference between 'I can find and change anything in 5 minutes' and 'I'm afraid to touch anything'. It's like organizing a kitchen -- when every tool has a clear place, you cook faster and never waste time searching. This course teaches practical code organization: how to name things, when to split files, how to separate concerns, and how to refactor without breaking everything.
